case_title: STEVEN SODOKOFF VS. TERI HOLLOWELL et al

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SODOKOFF, STEVEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM H. LARRY ELAM. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
